<?php /** * XHTML 1.1 Presentation Module, defines simple presentation-related * markup. Text Extension Module. * @note The official XML Schema and DTD specs further divide this into * two modules: * - Block Presentation (hr) * - Inline Presentation (b, big, i, small, sub, sup, tt) * We have chosen not to heed this distinction, as content_sets * provides satisfactory disambiguation. */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Presentation extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Presentation'; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config */ public function setup($config) { $this->addElement('hr', 'Block', 'Empty', 'Common'); $this->addElement('sub', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $this->addElement('sup', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $b = $this->addElement('b', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $b->formatting = true; $big = $this->addElement('big', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $big->formatting = true; $i = $this->addElement('i', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $i->formatting = true; $small = $this->addElement('small', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $small->formatting = true; $tt = $this->addElement('tt', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common'); $tt->formatting = true; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
